info.title: NOCLAR Intake Agent — Functions API
info.description:
OpenAPI spec for the tools attached to the `noclar-intake` agent (Lab 01). Exposes only `log_request` — the governance audit log written at the start of every conversation.

The orchestrator agent (Lab 02) uses a separate spec (`openapi-orchestrator.json`) for `persist_assessment` and `notify_reviewer`.

servers.description: Replace with the hostname from `azd env get-value AZURE_FUNCTION_APP_HOSTNAME` (e.g. `func-noclar-abc123.azurewebsites.net`) before pasting into Foundry.

post.summary: Write a governance log entry at the start of a conversation.
post.description: MUST be called by the agent on the **first turn** of every conversation, before any substantive question to the user. Writes one JSON blob to the `logs` container in the workshop Storage account.

functionKey.name: x-functions-key
functionKey.description: Azure Functions function-level access key. Get it with: `az functionapp keys list --name <funcApp> --resource-group <rg> --query masterKey -o tsv`

user_principal.description: AAD UPN of the engagement team member, if known.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp. Server-assigned if omitted.

intent.description: Optional hint from the caller about the conversation purpose.

log_blob.description: Blob path within the 'logs' container, e.g. "2026/05/18/setup-3f1a….json".
